title: geonoma cuneata subsp. cuneata
intro: Geonoma cuneata subsp. cuneata, also known as the palmate geonoma or palma de corteza, is a species of palm tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Geonoma cuneata subsp. cuneata include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant's medicinal properties are often extracted through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
